anatomyBody: A great case prompt is not just longer. It makes the creative intent and engineering boundaries clear at the same time.
anatomyTitle: Why is this case worth sharing?
cardBody: A strong case study that combines visual direction, interaction design, code constraints, and acceptance criteria in one prompt.

cases.brand: Brand site: use material metaphors for memorability
cases.commerce: Commerce hero: define focus through product story
cases.dashboard: Data dashboard: convert metrics into narrative flow
cases.saas: SaaS pricing: turn objections into page structure

casesPage.body: Browse high-quality prompt cases across different interaction types, then open a detail page for the full prompt, generated experience, and reuse guidance.
casesPage.title: Excellent Case Library

detail.notFoundBody: Return to the showcase and choose an available case.

eyebrow: A gallery for excellent prompt case studies
heroBody: Turn high-quality prompts like Lithos into learnable, reusable, and shareable case cards so creators can move from writing requests to defining shippable outcomes.
heroTitle: Collect prompts that already know how to ship.

homeSections.casesBody: Each case includes an experience preview, full prompt, best-use scenarios, key ingredients, and acceptance criteria.
homeSections.casesTitle: Start from visual cases, not blank prompts.
homeSections.methodBody: We evaluate structure, mechanics, acceptance criteria, transferability, and output consistency.
homeSections.methodTitle: Use one standard to judge whether a prompt is excellent.

libraryTitle: Make excellent prompts browsable as an inspiration library.

methodPage.body: A strong case prompt is not simply longer. It clarifies intent, constrains the boundaries, explains the interaction mechanism, and defines acceptance standards.

principles.acceptanceText: Quality can be judged through copy, styling, behavior, and accessibility states.
principles.mechanicText: The core interaction or visual mechanic includes parameters, steps, and boundary conditions.
principles.structureText: Stack, assets, layout, states, responsiveness, and delivery standards are clearly separated.

methodPage.title: How to evaluate excellent prompts

notFound.body: Return to the overview or choose an available page.
notFound.title: Page not found

overview.body: PromptFolio helps teams preserve reusable prompt assets through structured detail pages, visual previews, copy-ready prompts, and quality breakdowns.
overview.pill: Curated for design, frontend, and AI product teams
overview.title: A professional knowledge base for excellent prompt cases.

sections.acceptanceText: Sizes, classes, copy, colors, and animation delays are measurable, which reduces subjective interpretation and rework.
sections.completeText: It separates stack, fonts, assets, layers, interaction, animation, and responsive rules so implementation can begin immediately.
sections.mechanicText: Instead of saying “follow the cursor,” it specifies the canvas mask, radius, gradient stops, and RAF smoothing parameters.

aurora.acceptance: The button uses CSS-only animation; hover feels subtly magnetic; focus is visible; mobile sizing never overflows.
aurora.bestFor: Brand homepage CTAs, campaign landing pages, sign-in primary actions, and premium product launch entrances.
aurora.body: Best for premium CTAs, launch pages, sign-in flows, or event entrances.
aurora.ingredients: Dark glass base, conic-gradient aurora border, internal shimmer, bloom shadow, hover lift, and reduced-motion fallback.
aurora.prompt: Build a premium liquid aurora button using React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS. The button should have a dark glass base, animated conic-gradient aurora border, slow internal shimmer, soft bloom shadow, and a subtle magnetic hover lift. Include accessible focus states, reduced-motion fallback, and responsive sizing. Use only CSS animations, no animation libraries.
aurora.title: Liquid Aurora Button

orbit.acceptance: Hovering a chip pauses the orbit; central copy updates with state; keyboard operation works; narrow screens keep clear hierarchy.
orbit.bestFor: AI product feature tours, SaaS homepage modules, interactive navigation, and product capability maps.
orbit.body: Best for AI tools, SaaS feature modules, or memorable creative navigation.
orbit.ingredients: Central product card, four orbiting feature chips, hover pause, selected highlight, fade/slide copy updates, and keyboard-accessible buttons.
orbit.prompt: Create an interactive orbital feature selector in React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS. Show a central product card with four orbiting feature chips. Hovering a chip should pause the orbit, highlight the selected feature, and update the central description with a smooth fade/slide transition. Use lucide-react icons, keyboard-accessible buttons, and a polished responsive layout.
orbit.title: Orbital Feature Selector

showcaseBody: Here are two copy-ready prompt cases: one for silky CSS animation, and one for UI interaction. Each card includes a concrete visual treatment and the full prompt.
showcaseTitle: Excellent cases should show the experience, not just the text.
templateBody: The site can pair each prompt with the original text, teardown notes, quality tags, reusable templates, and visual previews.
templateTitle: Turn every case into a reusable prompt asset.
